tagline: Streamline Your Team's Workflow with Intelligent Project Management

primary.role: core brand color, headers, primary actions

hero_image_prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard showing AI-powered project management interface. Clean, minimalist design with blue and cyan color accents. Diverse team collaborating, multiple screens showing task tracking, analytics, and team communication features.

hero.headline: Supercharge Your Team's Productivity
hero.subheadline: Stackr is an AI-powered project management platform that transforms how teams collaborate, track progress, and achieve goals.

features.title: AI-Powered Task Management
features.description: Intelligent task prioritization and workload balancing that adapts to your team's unique workflow.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Seamless communication tools that keep your entire team connected and aligned.

features.title: Advanced Analytics
features.description: Comprehensive insights and predictive analytics to optimize team performance.

features.title: Customizable Workflows
features.description: Flexible project templates and workflow automation to match any team's process.

features.title: Secure Integration
features.description: Effortless integration with your existing tools and robust enterprise-grade security.

features.title: Mobile Sync
features.description: Full-featured mobile app that keeps your team productive from anywhere.

testimonials.quote: Stackr has completely transformed how our engineering team collaborates. The AI-powered insights are game-changing.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: We've seen a 40% increase in team productivity since implementing Stackr. It's like having a productivity coach built into our workflow.
testimonials.name: Michael Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: The integration capabilities and real-time analytics make Stackr an essential tool for our distributed team.
